introSection: Gee Whiz Dip The Dips, originally known as Figure Eight Toboggan, was a wooden side friction roller coaster previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was renamed Gee Whiz Dip The Dips in 1911.

The ride received new, larger cars in 1920.

fullText:
Gee Whiz Dip The Dips, originally known as Figure Eight Toboggan, was a wooden side friction roller coaster previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA.

The ride was renamed Gee Whiz Dip The Dips in 1911.

The ride received new, larger cars in 1920.
